alam_mo_ba: 'Trabaho' comes from Spanish 'trabajo.' The Philippines has one of the largest overseas worker populations in the world — OFWs (Overseas Filipino Workers) are sometimes called the country's 'modern heroes' for the remittances they send home.
completion_reward.alam_mo_ba_display: Show 1 random fun fact on lesson completion screen.

progress_ring.display: Ring animates from X/5 to (X+1)/5 on session completion
